detail: No subprocess calls. Uses defusedxml for safe XML parsing. Pure HTTP via requests library. Security-conscious.
100% coverage requirement (--fail-under=100 in pyproject.toml). 4 test modules (test_api, test_cli, test_formatters, test_proxies). 14 static test assets (HTML, JSON, XML fixtures).
CI workflow (ci.yml) with Coveralls integration. 120 workflow runs. Precommit task defined (format + lint + coverage).

Clean modular architecture: _api.py (public), _transcripts.py (models/fetcher), _errors.py (15+ exception types), _cli.py (CLI), formatters.py (5 formatters), proxies.py (abstract + 2 implementations), _settings.py (constants). Underscore prefix convention for internal modules.

Excellent abstraction: Formatter base class with 5 implementations, ProxyConfig ABC with Generic and Webshare implementations, _TextBasedFormatter intermediate class for SRT/WebVTT shared logic. No duplication.
FormatterLoader with TYPES registry for output formats. ProxyConfig ABC allows custom proxy implementations. http_client parameter allows Session injection. Clean extension points.
No API keys needed. Proxy credentials passed via config objects, never hard-coded. Cookie auth temporarily disabled due to YouTube API changes (responsible decision).
Minimal file I/O — library fetches via HTTP, no local file operations. Video ID sanitization in CLI. defusedxml prevents XML injection.
py.typed marker. Dataclasses for models. Type annotations on all public methods. TypedDict for proxy config. Ruff for linting.
Poetry with lock file. Only 2 runtime deps (requests, defusedxml). Test and dev deps in separate optional groups. Python 3.8-3.14 support.

Exceptional. 15+ specific exception types with CAUSE_MESSAGE explaining why each error occurs. Context-aware error messages (different proxy guidance based on config type). InvalidVideoId detects URL-instead-of-ID mistakes.
Thorough README with API examples, CLI usage, proxy configuration, IP ban workarounds. Comprehensive docstrings on all public methods. No architecture docs but code is self-documenting.
